imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Professional placement portal hero banner showing diverse students in professional attire with laptop and documents, modern office background (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Icon illustration representing job applications with briefcase and checkmark (job-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Icon illustration representing student profile with graduation cap and user silhouette (profile-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Replace the existing health recommendation system with a student placement portal that manages student profiles, company listings, job postings, and application tracking
Create a student dashboard that displays the logged-in student's profile, shows available job postings they are eligible for, and lists their application history with current status
Implement a job application flow where students can view job details and submit applications, with automatic eligibility checking based on CGPA and branch requirements
Create an admin view that allows placement coordinators to add new companies, post job openings, and update application statuses for students

Design a professional placement portal interface with a cohesive visual theme using corporate colors (navy, teal, gold accents), clean typography, and a modern card-based layout that emphasizes clarity and professionalism
Implement student profile creation and editing that allows users to input and update their academic details, skills, and resume link
